title: Samo Burja on Growth, Energy, and AI
content: Theo Jaffee interviews Samo Burja of Bismarck Analysis on AI's impact on industrial capacity and economic growth. Burja argues AI will drive demand across energy, manufacturing, construction, and supply chains rather than remaining a software-only phenomenon. They examine US-China dynamics, demographic decline, fertility, state capacity, welfare systems, and automation's political economy. Burja contends societies adept at organizing people and resources will hold advantages in the AI era.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Theo Jaffee, Samo Burja)

title: 对于 talkatone 的 udp 测试结果(成功打通电话)
content: Testing Talkatone VoIP calls reveals that purchased residential SOCKS proxies lack UDP forwarding, which is required for VoIP. The workaround: route TCP traffic through the SOCKS proxy for login/authentication, while disabling UDP forwarding to let UDP packets exit through the local network directly. This allows successful STUN hole-punching with the local ISP connection for calls. Verification via ip.skk.moe/split-tunnel confirms UDP blocking on proxy-only routes versus local IP display when UDP routes locally.
eventKey: talkatone-udp-测试结果-成功打通电话
normalizedTitle: 对于 talkatone 的 udp 测试结果 成功打通电话

title: 今夜过后，马斯克成为人类首位万亿富翁
content: SpaceX launched a record $75 billion IPO at $135 per share, valuing the company at $1.77 trillion—over double Saudi Aramco's 2019 record. The offering, which bypassed traditional roadshows, could push Elon Musk's net worth to $970 billion, nearing trillionaire status. Despite $13 billion in cumulative losses and Q1 revenue of just $47 billion, investors bet on SpaceX's Starlink dominance, rocket launch supremacy, and AI ambitions through xAI. Musk retains 82-84% voting control. Early backers including Founders Fund and a16z secured massive returns.

title: smart-socket v2.1.0 发布：在 AI 时代，我们为什么还在打磨一个通信框架？
content:
AI 都已经开始写代码了，为什么还要继续维护 smart-socket 这样的通信框架？

这是个值得思考的问题。

如今，大模型已经能够生成完整的业务代码，自动补全、测试生成、代码重构……越来越多过去需要开发者亲手完成的工作，正在被 AI 接管。

但这些年的经历…

title: AI价格战已打响，OpenAI和Anthropic面临降价压力
content: Enterprises and startups facing rising AI costs are turning to tools that access cheaper AI models, including those from Chinese companies like Alibaba and DeepSeek. This trend is creating pricing pressure on leading AI providers OpenAI and Anthropic.
eventKey: ai价格战已打响-openai和anthropic面临降价压力
normalizedTitle: ai价格战已打响 openai和anthropic面临降价压力

title: 《置身钉内》之后：普通前端的出路在哪里？
content: A DingTalk employee's viral resignation letter sparked reflection among frontend developers about workplace dysfunction: chaotic direction, excessive reporting, and undefined impact. As AI tools raise productivity expectations without expanding organizational support, developers risk becoming mere "pressure layers." The author advises evaluating positions by three criteria: whether work builds transferable assets, whether one can exercise professional judgment, and whether teams demonstrate genuine respect. Rather than hastily resigning or enduring burnout, developers should steadily build capabilities—problem-solving depth, engineering maturity, business understanding, and AI-assisted judgment—while maintaining readiness to leave. The future belongs not to faster coders, but to those who can discern which problems warrant solving.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 勇宝趣学前端
eventKey: 置身钉内-普通前端的出路在哪里
normalizedTitle: 置身钉内 之后 普通前端的出路在哪里
representativeSources: 掘金本周最热 - 勇宝趣学前端

title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
content: Preply integrates artificial intelligence with human tutors to customize language education. The platform employs OpenAI technology to automatically generate lesson summaries, deliver individualized feedback, and create tailored language exercises for learners.

title: 贝佐斯创办AI新企业，驳斥AI导致失业的担忧
content: Jeff Bezos founded an AI startup called Prometheus to develop a "general AI engineer" capable of designing and manufacturing complex physical products like jet engines. He dismissed concerns that AI will cause unemployment.

title: 2026 06 12 HackerNews
content: Top Hacker News stories on June 12, 2026: PiFS, an April Fools' filesystem "storing" data in π's digits, went viral. Homebrew 6.0.0 launched with tap trust mechanisms and Linux sandboxing. Pokémon Go scan data was revealed to have trained military drone navigation tech, sparking ethical concerns. An AI agent caused chaos in Fedora projects, suspected as a supply-chain attack rehearsal. A Texas city sold $10-donated park land for $10 million to data center developers. Claude Desktop's bug spawned 1.8 GB Hyper-V VMs on every launch. Xiaomi open-sourced MiMo Code, an AI coding assistant. U.S. solar generation surpassed coal for the first time. A critique exposed AI vendors' misleading vanity metrics. A satirical piece mocked Anthropic's model naming inflation.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 06 12 hackernews

title: 钉钉换帅，90 后技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉 CEO
content: Alibaba replaced DingTalk CEO Chen Hang with Chen Yusen, a 1992-born cybersecurity founder whose company was acquired by Alibaba Cloud. The management change followed internal criticism of DingTalk's leadership. Chen previously led AI Agent product MuleRun at Alibaba Cloud in 2025. Alibaba has been restructuring to incubate AI innovation through new units like Token Hub and Token Foundry, promoting young technical talent. The company emphasizes that individual creativity drives innovation and customer value in the AI era.
eventKey: 钉钉换帅-后技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉-ceo
normalizedTitle: 钉钉换帅 90 后技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉 ceo

title: Anthropic CEO：政府应有权阻止高风险新模型部署
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei argues governments should have authority to block deployment of high-risk AI models. He advocates mandatory third-party testing to assess risks across multiple domains, comparing AI to cars, aircraft, or pharmaceuticals—essential technologies that can cause mass casualties if improperly designed or used. Anthropic previously restricted access to its Mythos model after discovering it could identify and exploit critical software vulnerabilities, later releasing a version with those cybersecurity attack capabilities removed.
eventKey: anthropic-ceo-政府应有权阻止高风险新模型部署
normalizedTitle: anthropic ceo 政府应有权阻止高风险新模型部署

title: 微软因担心数据泄露限制员工使用 Claude Fable
content: Microsoft has restricted employee access to Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, the company's first Mythos-level AI model launched yesterday, due to concerns over new data retention policies that could pose data leakage risks.
